verdict_note: Beats baseline on every measured metric, regresses none (format_ok 0.0857->0.20, reply parse-errors 8->0, claude_distill format 27.3%->63.6%, gen tps +33%). Does NOT clear the absolute format_ok publish floor (smoke 0.5 / full 0.7) which is calibrated for a full-corpus fine-tune. PUBLISH must block defaultEligible until a full-corpus run lands a green format_ok gate; stage as a candidate revision only meanwhile.

gguf_q4_k_m.smoke_load: llama-cli timed out at 180s on the build host (slow box; not a conversion failure)

eliza1_sidecar_bundle.caveat: Built from the EARLIER 1778515903 checkpoint, not the eval_loss-1.315 1778551769/final weights. PUBLISH should re-run scripts/quantization/gguf_eliza1_apply.py against 1778551769/final before publishing so the bundle matches the canonical weights.

benchmark_table.note: Smoke-corpus eval (data/final/test.jsonl, max 12/bucket, 35 examples). Absolute values are low because the structural gates expect a full-corpus fine-tune (~0.95 parsable-format target). The relative deltas are the signal.
